scadenzeOspitante.citazione: 30th of June - for students planning to attend the upcoming winter semester or full academic year; 30th of November - for students planning to attend the summer semester in the ongoing academic year.

linkCatalogo.citazione: The list of courses can be found here.

notaDisponibilita.citazione: some of the courses may vary upon arrival due to some of them being optional. Students will receive the final open courses 1-2 weeks before the official start of lectures.
